final:
module clock_gating(
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire [1:0] data_in,
    output reg [1:0] data_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (enable) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end
endmodule
